say 显式参数可以覆盖角色定义。: Explicit say parameters override character definitions.
抱歉，你的金币不够。: Sorry, you don't have enough gold.
不过你若是执意要去，带上把好武器。: But if you insist on going, bring a good weapon.
但要小心，洞穴里的力量不是凡人能驾驭的。: But be careful, the power in that cave is not for mortals to wield.
当你回到阳光下时，森林的雾气已经散去。: When you return to the sunlight, the forest mist has cleared.
等有了钱再来吧。: Come back when you have enough gold.
洞口漆黑一片，你没有任何线索，不知道里面有什么。: The cave entrance is pitch black, you have no clues about what's inside.
洞穴开始震动，你迅速跑向出口。: The cave begins to shake, you quickly run toward the exit.
而你，即将揭开这一切背后的{b}{color=#FFD700}秘密{/color: And you, are about to uncover the {b}{color=#FFD700}secret{/color}{/b} behind it all.
故事到此结束。返回标题可重新开始。: The story ends here. Return to title to start over.
哼，区区勇者也敢挑战我？: Hmph, a mere hero dares to challenge me?
晶石的光芒逐渐黯淡，最终化为一缕青烟消散。: The crystal's glow gradually dims, finally dissipating into wisps of smoke.
晶石似乎感应到了你的到来，光芒开始剧烈跳动。: The crystal seems to sense your arrival, its light pulsing intensely.
酒馆老板为你倒了一杯酒：我就知道你不是普通人。: The innkeeper pours you a drink: I knew you were no ordinary person.
快去森林吧，那个洞穴还在等着你。: Hurry to the forest, that cave is still waiting for you.
老朋友！来，这杯算我请的。: Old friend! Come, this round is on me.
老人看到你回来，微笑着点了点头。: The old man sees you return and nods with a smile.
力量是诱人的，但它从来不问代价。: Power is tempting, but it never asks about the cost.
旅人啊，你踏着暮色而来，带着满身的尘土与疲惫。: Traveler, you arrive at dusk, covered in dust and weariness.
没有人敢接近你。你成了小镇新的传说——一个可怕的传说。: No one dares approach you. You've become the town's new legend—a terrifying one.
迷雾笼罩着这座小镇，没有人记得它何时出现。: Mist shrouds this town, no one remembers when it appeared.
迷雾小镇依旧是那个迷雾小镇，日复一日。: The misty town remains as it always was, day after day.
迷雾中隐约可见两座建筑——一座酒馆，一座广场。: Through the mist, two structures are visible—an inn and a square.
那个洞穴里据说封印着某种力量。: They say some kind of power is sealed in that cave.
那是一块星辰碎片——传说中蕴含着巨大力量的遗物。: It's a Star Fragment—a relic said to contain immense power.
你拔出武器，向野狼冲去！: You draw your weapon and charge at the wolf!
你闭上眼，将双手按在晶石上，低声念出封印的咒语。: You close your eyes, press your hands against the crystal, and whisper the sealing incantation.
Those you once helped feel sorry for you...
你成功击退了野狼！: You successfully drove off the wolf!
你带着一身疲惫回到镇上，继续你平凡的旅途。: You return to town exhausted, continuing your ordinary journey.
你感到前所未有的强大，但同时，某种东西在心中消逝。: You feel stronger than ever, but at the same time, something fades within your heart.
你喝了一杯蜜酒，温暖传遍全身。: You drink a cup of mead, warmth spreading through your body.
你回到了酒馆大厅。: You return to the inn hall.
你回到森林入口喘了口气。: You catch your breath at the forest entrance.
你径直从老人身边走过，他叹了口气。: You walk past the old man, he sighs.
你看了看晶石，最终转身离开。: You look at the crystal, then turn and leave.
你狼狈地回到入口，勉强缓过气来。: You stumble back to the entrance, barely catching your breath.
你伸手触碰晶石，一股灼热的力量涌入体内。: You reach out and touch the crystal, a searing power floods into your body.
你险些倒下，但靠意志撑住了。: You nearly collapse, but hold on through willpower.
你想打听点什么？: What would you like to ask about?
你需要做出最终的选择。: You need to make the final choice.
你要去森林吗？那里有座洞穴，传说藏着星辰的碎片。: Are you going to the forest? There's a cave there, said to hide a Star Fragment.
你要是真想去，先确认自己够强。: If you really want to go, make sure you're strong enough first.
你已经帮过我了，快去森林吧。: You've already helped me, hurry to the forest.
你站在小镇入口，雾气在脚边翻涌。: You stand at the town entrance, mist churning at your feet.
你知道自己做了正确的事，尽管没有人会知道真相。: You know you did the right thing, even though no one will ever know the truth.
你转身就跑，野狼在后面追了一阵后放弃了。: You turn and run, the wolf chases for a while then gives up.
你走出洞穴，迷雾依旧。: You exit the cave, the mist remains.
你走出洞穴时，雾气散了。小镇的人们用恐惧的目光看着你。: When you exit the cave, the mist clears. The townsfolk look at you with fearful eyes.
你走进洞穴，空气冰冷而干燥。: You enter the cave, the air is cold and dry.
哦？新来的旅人？坐吧，别客气。: Oh? A new traveler? Sit down, make yourself comfortable.
前方是一座陌生的城镇，空气中弥漫着潮湿的木头气味。: Ahead lies an unfamiliar town, the air thick with the smell of damp wood.
A low growl comes from the bushes ahead...
森林比想象中更安静，静得有些不自然。: The forest is quieter than expected, unnaturally so.
森林深处那座洞穴...我劝你别去。: That cave deep in the forest... I'd advise against going there.
我不是告诉你了吗？森林深处的洞穴，别去。: Didn't I tell you? The cave deep in the forest, don't go.
我是勇者，名字和颜色由 character 定义。: I am the Hero, name and color defined by character definition.
小镇重见天日，人们纷纷走上街头，惊叹不已。: The town sees daylight again, people pour into the streets in amazement.
谢谢你，年轻人。这把旧骨头真是不中用了。: Thank you, young one. These old bones aren't what they used to be.
星辰碎片的力量不会消失，它只是回到了它该在的地方。: The power of the Star Fragment doesn't disappear, it simply returns to where it belongs.
也许该回镇上打听一下消息。: Maybe I should head back to town to gather information.
也许有一天，会有另一个旅人来到这里，做出不同的选择。: Perhaps one day, another traveler will arrive here and make a different choice.
野狼被击中，受到 {_local_dmg} 点伤害！: The wolf is hit, taking {_local_dmg} damage!
野狼反咬一口，你损失了 {_local_wolf_dmg} 点HP！: The wolf bites back, you lose {_local_wolf_dmg} HP!
野狼逃走了，前方的路畅通了。: The wolf flees, the path ahead is clear.
一只野狼挡住了去路！它的眼睛在雾中闪着绿光。: A wolf blocks the path! Its eyes glow green in the mist.
有人看见森林深处有光，但没人敢进去看。: Someone saw light deep in the forest, but no one dared to investigate.
有人说那是星辰坠落留下的碎片。: Some say it's a fragment left by a fallen star.
有些力量，不属于凡人。: Some powers are not meant for mortals.
又是你啊，最近怎么样？: It's you again, how have you been?
在洞穴的尽头，你看到了一块悬浮在空中的发光晶石。: At the end of the cave, you see a glowing crystal hovering in the air.
这就是传闻中的洞穴。你能感觉到里面蕴含着某种力量。: This is the legendary cave. You can sense some kind of power within.
These days, no one even stops to chat anymore...
这是第二句，按 Back 键回退到上一句。: This is the second line, press Back to go to the previous line.
这是第三句，按 Forward 键可以前进。: This is the third line, press Forward to advance.
这是第一句对话，可以尝试回溯到这里。: This is the first line, you can try rolling back to here.
这镇子不太平，你小心点。: This town isn't peaceful, be careful.
镇民们的目光躲闪而警惕，似乎在隐瞒着什么{p}: The townsfolk avert their eyes warily, as if hiding something{p}
至少你击退了野狼，证明了自己的勇气。: At least you drove off the wolf, proving your courage.
The mist around town has been getting thicker lately...
你将如何对待星辰碎片？: How will you deal with the Star Fragment?
如何应对野狼？: How will you handle the wolf?
点击按钮体验不同的过渡效果: Click buttons to try different transition effects
洞穴深处散发着微弱的光芒。: A faint glow emanates from deep within the cave.
前方出现了一个幽暗的洞口，冷风从中吹出。: A dark cave opening appears ahead, cold wind blowing from within.
树木在雾中若隐若现，脚下是松软的落叶。: Trees loom in the mist, fallen leaves soft underfoot.
一位老人坐在喷泉旁，似乎在等什么人。: An old man sits by the fountain, seemingly waiting for someone.
